{{Item
| image = Sunglasses.png
| id = sunglasses
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeab;e
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Dog Sunglasses''' is a non-dyable equipable item that makes your dog look cooler. B)

[[File:Sunglasses display.png|frameless|606x606px]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Sticks <br>+ Black Stained Glass Pane
| [[File:Sunglasses crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Used In ==
* [[Smarty Glasses]]

== Trivia ==
It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
